_comment: 全球與各國深度洞察：人工整理自 Ember、IEA、BloombergNEF 等權威來源，附連結。

text.zh: 歷史性時刻：2025 年再生能源發電（33.8%）一百年來首度超越燃煤（33.0%），燃煤佔比史上第一次跌破三分之一。
text.en: A historic milestone: in 2025 renewables (33.8%) overtook coal (33.0%) for the first time in a century — coal fell below a third of global power for the first time ever.

text.zh: 2025 年太陽能發電量激增 636 TWh（+30%），單獨滿足了全球 75% 的新增用電需求；加上風力則滿足了 99%。
text.en: Solar surged by a record 636 TWh (+30%) in 2025, alone meeting 75% of the world's new electricity demand; together with wind, 99%.

text.zh: 2025 年全球化石燃料發電不增反減（−0.2%），是疫情後首見——潔淨電力的成長第一次真正追上了需求成長。
text.en: Global fossil generation actually fell (−0.2%) in 2025 — the first non-pandemic decline, as clean power growth finally caught up with demand growth.

text.zh: 2025 年中國化石燃料發電下降 56 TWh（−0.9%），是 2015 年以來首度下降；2024 年全球太陽能發電成長有 53% 來自中國。
text.en: China's fossil generation fell 56 TWh (−0.9%) in 2025 — its first decline since 2015; in 2024, 53% of the world's solar growth happened in China.

text.zh: 中國同時是潔淨能源設備的世界工廠：太陽能板、電池芯產能佔全球約八成，並吸走 2024 年全球 76% 的潔淨科技建廠投資。
text.en: China is also the world's clean-tech factory: ~80% of global solar-panel and battery-cell capacity, and 76% of 2024's global clean-tech factory investment.

text.zh: 2025 年印度化石燃料發電下降 52 TWh（−3.3%）——太陽能與風電雙雙創紀錄成長、水力豐沛，本世紀首次與中國同年出現化石發電下降。
text.en: India's fossil generation fell 52 TWh (−3.3%) in 2025 on record solar and wind growth plus strong hydro — the first year this century it declined in both India and China.

text.zh: 德國所在的歐盟正快速去煤：歐盟 27 國燃煤發電佔比從 2005 年的 25% 降到 2025 年只剩 9.2%。
text.en: The EU around Germany is phasing coal out fast: the EU-27's coal share fell from 25% in 2005 to just 9.2% in 2025.

text.zh: 丹麥是現代風電的發源地：Vestas 是中國以外最大風機製造商，Ørsted 開創了離岸風電產業。
text.en: Denmark is the birthplace of modern wind power: Vestas is the largest turbine maker outside China, and Ørsted pioneered the offshore wind industry.
